candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current assets; directly matches ACT definition.
Current-asset component, not the total; inferior to reported total current assets.
Balancing line, not a reported financial-statement total.
Non-current assets, opposite of target.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit reported total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line; preferred over cash-flow period-end duplication.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period
candidates.why: Cash-flow statement ending cash equals CHE in many cases, but balance-sheet label is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not the balance-sheet period-end amount for CHE.
Tax cash flow, unrelated to cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition of subsidaries net of cash
candidates.why: Investing cash-flow item, unrelated to cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Acquisition/disposal of subsidiaries net of cash acquired/disposed
candidates.why: Investing cash-flow item, unrelated to cash balance.
Operating/financing cash-flow item, unrelated to cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Effect of exchange rate movements on cash
candidates.why: Reconciliation item, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Used the balance-sheet cash balance rather than the cash-flow reconciliation line.

candidates.why: Exact reported total for current liabilities; best match to LCT.
Also semantically exact, but appears inconsistent in the asset section with values matching non-current assets/current liabilities mix; lower reliability than the later reported total line.
Only one component of current liabilities, not the total.
Balancing line, not a reported total.
Noncurrent balancing line, wrong concept.

variables.notes: Preferred the clearly reported total current liabilities line over the earlier duplicate/case-variant label with suspect placement.

candidates.why: Clean current interest-bearing debt line; best direct match for short-term debt and excludes lease wording.
Also a direct short-term borrowing line; likely used in other periods when the prior label is absent. Suitable as alternate priority label across years.
Current lease liability, but STD baseline explicitly excludes leases.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Lease maturities are explicitly excluded from STD baseline.
Operating payable, not debt.

variables.notes: Included both labels as a priority list for changing row labels across years, not for same-year summation. Both are clean current borrowing labels and exclude lease liabilities.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet label for taxes payable/current tax liabilities, though wording is somewhat generic.
Could represent tax provision rather than current taxes payable; less direct than Tax Liabilities.

variables.notes: Chose a confident out-of-shortlist balance-sheet tax liability label; no manual review needed.

candidates.why: Exact PPE balance-sheet line; directly matches target and preferable to gross/depreciation components.
Intangible, not PPE.
Intangible, not PPE.
Intangible, not PPE.
Intangible balancing line, not PPE.
Capex cash-flow item, not PPE stock.
Disposal cash-flow item, not PPE stock.
Intangible cash-flow item, not PPE.
Intangible cash-flow item, not PPE.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit PPE balance-sheet line.

candidates.why: Exact total assets line on the balance sheet.

candidates.row_label: Net Cash flow from Operating activities
candidates.why: Exact net operating cash flow line; best match for OANCF.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before changes in working capital
candidates.why: Pre-working-capital subtotal, not the final net operating cash flow target.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities before change in working capital Cash flow from change in working capital - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing line, not the reported OANCF total.

final_choice.row_label: Net Cash flow from Operating activities

variables.notes: Used the explicit net cash flow from operating activities line.
